sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61853" key="lampromoiri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαμπρο-μοιρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n61853.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λαμπραὶ μοῖραι</ref> </xr> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λαμπρός</foreign> IV), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).243</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).207</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
